steps.t: Greith in the Twenty-first Hall considers himself a master of locks and keys and is always telling people so. Mithrandir thinks that finding the door …
Greith told you of a number of doors south-west of the Twenty-first Hall that the corrupted key might unlock.
Greith told you of a number of doors south-west of the Twenty-first Hall that the corrupted key might unlock.
Greith is outside the unlocked door in Khazad-dûm, south-west of the Twenty-first Hall and down many levels.
Elrond is at the Haven of Orladion in Rivendell, north-west of the Last Homely House. You have cleansed the corruption from the Key of the Forgotten, …
